slots.name: subheading
slots.copy: For go-to-market teams planning the next quarter — the research, field-tested tactics, and candid lessons behind what actually moves revenue.

copy.heading: The 2026 State of Customer Platforms
copy.text: 1,200 GTM leaders on what agentic AI actually changed — where it moved the pipeline, and where the hype outran the results.

asset.alt: The 2026 State of Customer Platforms — report cover

rationale: A single content-hub hero built on the hero-content-featured-lead genre archetype: a left masthead column (register eyebrow + display hub heading + promise line + a quiet 'Browse all articles' link) beside a right featured card that gives the flagship '2026 State of Customer Platforms' report real estate — warm editorial cover art, category eyebrow, its own title tier, a real research byline, and the single filled 'Read the report' primary. Chosen archetype fits the brief better than the three project seeds (photo-overlay/closing-cta/testimonial-tab), so novelty is novel. Heading holds the only display tier while the card title stays at title (avoids AS-51 double display); no dark band (brand never-dark-mid-page), sentence-case weight-500 headings (never-heavy-headings), and a fresh 'panel' surface for gallery variety. Clean SaaS discipline: even split on the shared grid, no off-grid treatments, one primary action per group.
